$ticketid.label: Current ticket ID
$ticketid.description: Resolves to the Faultid of the ticket being viewed. Use in lookups and ticket-scoped reports.

$agentid.label: Current agent ID
$agentid.description: Resolves to the UNum of the logged-in agent.

$userid.label: Current user ID
$userid.description: Resolves to the uid of the end user on the ticket.

$siteid.label: Current site ID
$siteid.description: Resolves to the SSitenum of the site context.

$clientid.label: Current client/organisation ID
$clientid.description: Resolves to the AArea of the client context.

$invoiceid.label: Current invoice ID
$invoiceid.description: Resolves to the invoice being viewed.

notes: Always use SELECT — never INSERT, UPDATE, DELETE, or DROP
Use TOP N instead of LIMIT N
Use CONVERT() or CAST() for type conversions
Use ISNULL() instead of IFNULL() or COALESCE() when checking single values
ntext columns (Note, EmailBody, Clearance, etc.) require CONVERT(nvarchar(max), column) before comparison or output
Date functions: GETDATE(), DATEADD(), DATEDIFF(), FORMAT()
String functions: LEFT(), RIGHT(), CHARINDEX(), LEN(), REPLACE()
Use single quotes for string literals
Column aliases use [Square Brackets] or 'single quotes' with AS
